parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

options.systemMessage: Ти аналітик. Повертай ТІЛЬКИ valid JSON без markdown.

assignments.name: companyName
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const url = $json.company || $json.url || $json.URL || ''; const match = url.match(/https?:\/\/(?:www\.)?([^\/\.]+)/i); return match ? match[1].charAt(0).toUpperCase() + match[1].slice(1) : 'Unknown'; })() }}
